expectations.text: Explains disappeared as a window-level disappearance
expectations.evidence: Directly describes it as a previously observed tmux window no longer being present in the session.

expectations.text: Lists plausible causes such as kill, replace, or session/window removal
expectations.evidence: Covers intentional kill/replace/remove and session rebuild scenarios.

expectations.text: Explains how to judge whether the disappearance was expected
expectations.evidence: Tells the reader to check whether the logical task still exists in another window and whether the disappearance was intentional.
Clearly says not to infer a normal process result from the disappearance event.
